titleStmt.title: SII 33.245: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 245. (A.R. No. B 291 of 1953.) Nāyakallu, Kurnool Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Pillar in the maṇḍapa of Mādhavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Kārttika śu. 12, corresponding to 1548 A.D., October 14, Sunday.

Records the gift of lands in Kandanavrōlu, surnamed as Tippasamudram for food offerings to the god Mādhavarāya by Goṇḍrājulayya, son of Gauḍrāju Penamarāju of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra. And also records the grant of lands and the gāḍibhāvi in the village Anugoṇḍa (as the fief of Veṅkatādurāju) to the brāhmaṇas. Also refers to Śrīraṅgāchāryulu as the guru of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śaka varuṣaṁbulu 1470 Agunē
ṭi kīlaka saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śuddha 12 puṇya
kālamaṁddu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kā
syapa gōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyu
laina gauḍraju penamarāju komāruṁḍu goṁḍrāju
layya dēvamahārājulu kaṁdanavroli
paratināmamaina tippasamudraṁ
pu Agrahāraṁmaṁddu vrittulu saṁ
vittulu 15 I deyya vrittulalōnuvemu Ā
Ubhayatavokalriṁgānuṁgoni tippasamudraṁ
mādhavarāyaniki nēvēdya Amarālaku sama¨rppistimi
vosivoka vrittiki kala Aṣṭabhōga lējasvāmya

valunnu sarvōtpatti samasta baḷa sahitaṁgānu dhāra
vōsiyistimi . māku veṁkaṭādrirājugāru
Amarānaku pāliṁcina Anugoṁḍa polimēralōnu
vūrimuṁdara gāḍibāvi samastamunnu
samagra
ppa mugra brāṁhmalaku sagamunu sama¨rppicci
yistimi . ganaka tamataṁḍri pennama
guruvulu śrīraṁgācā¨ryyalakuṁnnu puṁṇyaṁ
gānu śrovaṁcanamuganu dhāravōsi yisti
mi
Digital edition of SII 33.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
